'''Gold 3''' was the designation of a [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. Flown by [[Ryle Torsyn/Legends|Ryle Torsyn]], the [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] was originally stationed at [[Dantooine base/Legends|Dantooine base]] where it was part of the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] under [[Davish Krail/Legends|Davish Krail's]] command.<ref name="CCG-Gold3" />

Following the evacuation of Dantooine base,<ref name="CCG-Torsyn" /> Gold 3 was transferred to the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="ANH" /> Torsyn flew the fighter as part of [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCG-Torsyn" />
